title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Hollis, Queens | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Hollis, Queens. Humane bat control for residential and commercial properties. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Hollis homeowners facing bat infestations need prompt, humane removal services to protect their families and property. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in safe bat removal and exclusion for Hollis residences, ensuring bats are removed according to New York wildlife regulations. Our experienced technicians provide comprehensive solutions tailored to the unique architectural features common in this historic Queens neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Hollis and surrounding Queens communities for years with certified bat removal specialists who understand local wildlife patterns and building structures. We combine humane removal techniques with permanent exclusion methods, backed by warranties that give Hollis homeowners lasting peace of mind.
localContext: Hollis features a mix of charming single-family homes, Tudor-style houses, and older residential structures near landmarks like the Hollis Station and St. Albans Park, where attic spaces and roof gaps can attract roosting bats. The tree-lined streets and proximity to green spaces make professional bat exclusion especially important for protecting these well-established neighborhood properties.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Hollis typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the complexity of your home's structure. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in New York City regulated?
faqs.answer: Yes, bat removal in NYC must follow strict wildlife protection laws. Bats cannot be harmed or removed during maternity season (roughly May through August). Best Pest Control NYC follows all federal and state regulations, using humane exclusion methods that allow bats to leave but not return.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our bat exclusion process includes a thorough inspection to locate entry points and roosting areas, installation of one-way exclusion devices that let bats exit safely, sealing all potential entry points with durable materials, attic cleanup and decontamination if needed, and a warranty to ensure bats don't return.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bats from my Hollis home?
faqs.answer: We can typically schedule an inspection within 24-48 hours. The exclusion process usually takes 3-7 days for bats to naturally exit, followed by permanent sealing of entry points. Outside of maternity season, most Hollis bat removal projects are completed within 1-2 weeks from initial contact.
